name: Opo Wae Taktabrak
lore:
Lore of Opo Wae Taktabrak
                                    


Opo Wae Taktabrak is an Indonesian brainrot character created by TikTok user @noxaasht on the 26th of April, 2025.
It is an old, rusty white car with human limbs in place of wheels and a jaw with rotten teeth instead of a registration plate. It can be seen in abandoned landfills, with other broken down cars in the background. It is said to damage the cars of people who watch TikTok videos depicting car crashes. It also has the ability to grow eyes on its windshield.
It was corrupted counterpart of Mi Propio Mi Propio.
Lyrics
Original (Indonesian)
Opo Wae Taktabrak seng menjadi penghalang? Hayyah, pala eng sakit lo. Lu orang tablak-tablak eng. Ni eng jadi hancur gini. Trend TikTok ni makin hari makin aneh ya? Tablak mobil lah, tablak orang lah, lu semua ah barang lu tablak, napa malah jadi trend gini lo? Hai, selama-lma woi pusing glo. Ni dengerin ni. Ya, konon katanya kalau ada orang yang pernah like trend ini, maka makhluk ini akan datang ke rumahmu. Ia akan merusak mobil kamu dahulu lalu ia akan mengetuk pintu dan bersuara sampai oli bensin kamu habis.
Translation (English)
What's the point of crashing and being an obstacle? Hey, you're sick. You're a person who crashes. You're ruined like this. This TikTok trend is getting weirder by the day, huh? Crashing into cars, crashing into people, crashing into everything, why is it becoming a trend like this? Hey, you've been having a headache for a long time. Listen to this. Yes, it's said that if someone likes this trend, this creature will come to your house. It will damage your car first, then it will knock on the door and make noise until your gas runs out.
